top_signals.title: Asia tech stocks rebound after Wall Street chip names recover
top_signals.summary: Asia's technology stocks largely rebounded on Tuesday as investors returned to artificial intelligence-linked names, tracking Wall Street's gains.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: AI Economics Institute Prospectus
top_signals.summary: The prospectus sets out how the AI Economics Institute will deliver its research through two core functions: building and analysing the evidence base to understand AI’s economic effects, and developing models and scenarios to inform resilient, future facing policy making.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Introducing the AI Economics Institute
top_signals.summary: Overview of AI Economics Institute, its role in analysing AI’s economic impacts and how it will support evidence-based policy making in the UK.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR gains 12.3% as almost all assets trade higher
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Wallets linked to Humanity Protocol drained for over $32 million, token plunges 89%: onchain analyst
top_signals.summary: Out of the stolen amount, $23.7 million has been swapped for Ethereum, while around $7.9 million remains in H tokens.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
